subject: Fermi  trigger No 770867684: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V.Lipunov, E.Gorbovskoy, A.Kuznetsov, K.Zhirkov, I.Panchenko, N.Tiurina, P.Balanutsa, V.Topolev, D.Vlasenko, 
G.Antipov,  A.Sankovich, Yu.Tselik, Ya.Kechin, V.Senik, A.Chasovnikov, K.Labsina, I. Gorbunov (Lomonosov MSU),

A.Sosnovskij (CrAO),

L.Carrasco, J.R.Valdes, V.Chavushyan, V.M.Patino Alvarez, J.Martinez,
A.R.Corella, L.H.Rodriguez (INAOE, Guillermo Haro Astrophysics Observatory) 

MASTER-SAAO robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in South Africa (South African Astronomical Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB250606.08 (trigger No 770867684,11h 54m 36.00s , -54d 01m 12.0s, R=8.02) errorbox  145 sec after notice time and 170 sec after trigger time at 2025-06-06 01:57:29 UT, with upper limit up to  18.0 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 81 deg. The sun  altitude  is -44.9 deg. 

MASTER-OAFA robotic telescope  located in Argentina (OAFA observatory of San Juan National University) started inspect of the Fermi GRB250606.08 errorbox  146 sec after notice time and 171 sec after trigger time at 2025-06-06 01:57:30 UT, with upper limit up to  19.4 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 33 deg. The sun  altitude  is -54.5 deg. 

The galactic latitude b =  8 deg., longitude l = 295 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2893923

We obtain a following upper limits.
